title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
